title: Department of Coaching Education - Message from the Head of the Department
content:
Department of Coaching Education - Message from the Head of the Department

Dear students,

The Coaching Education Department was opened in 2016 under the Istanbul Esenyurt University School of Physical Education and Sports. In our department, a 4-year undergraduate education is given.

Educational activities are carried out by academicians who are experts in their fields in order to train our students as coaches in various sports branches. In our department, studies are carried out in accordance with the needs and requirements of our country in the field of sports.

The course programs are planned in accordance with the needs and demands of the sector. In the courses, the current education model, which includes theoretical and applied studies according to the fields of sports sciences, is applied. With the sports activities within the scope of our department, studies are carried out to enable our students to participate in various activities.

As the Coaching Education Department, I would like to state that we are open to supporting your development in the field of sports. Bringing our students to our country as qualified coaches is the priority of our department.

I wish each of you success.

Kind regards,

This content was updated on 29/01/2026.
